events.description: Honda revises 2030 EV sales target down to 20% and cuts investment from 10T to 7T yen, emphasizing HEV.
Honda cancels North American EV models (0 Series) and records massive operating expenses/losses.
Sony Honda Mobility (Afeela) project effectively cancelled or restructured.

summary: The predicted risk factors demonstrated high precision and recall, successfully anticipating the major strategic pivots and cancellations. Specifically, factors regarding market timing (IND002), capital allocation strain (COM001), and product portfolio gaps (COM003) strongly predicted the downscaling of EV targets and the cancellation of the 0 Series. While the specific cancellation of the Sony partnership (gt_003) was only partially predicted as a general execution risk in joint ventures, the overall assessment accurately captured the fundamental failure of Honda's aggressive independent EV transition strategy.
